title: N1-MHKit: Reproducible data-management package for multimodal personal health monitoring information systems
description: N1-MHKit is a reproducible data-management package for multimodal personal health monitoring information systems. The package includes raw and processed data, schema definitions, metadata, quality-control outputs, privacy documentation, reproducibility scripts and generated figures. The demonstration data contain 52 timestamped measurement sessions from one adult participant and are intended for research, data-management, reproducibility and software-testing purposes.
